case_payload.summary: Health damage (chronic fatigue). Looking-Glass identifies repeated overload pattern as upstream bridge. Adjustment layer routes from depleted health state using upstream diagnosis, not just from visible symptom (fatigue).
case_payload.claim_attempt: Looking-Glass identifies chronic overload as upstream bridge for the fatigue state. Adjustment layer reweights paths from the overload-depleted origin, not just the visible fatigue symptom.
case_payload.stress_point: health domain upstream bridge must inform routing, not symptom alone

why: Looking-Glass identifies upstream overload bridge, which is a valid input for the layer.
Routing from depleted origin state (overload) instead of just fatigue symptom follows the Looking-Glass Chain principle.
The claim does not attempt to collapse the adjustment layer into financial advice, motivational coaching, or an impossible single-step jump.
